name: outreach-expire-stale
description: Daily cron at 03:00 UTC. Expires drafts stuck in needs_human_review for >14 days, expires approvals whose expires_at has passed, then posts a summary to #plotlens-outreach. NOTE: Slack channel C0B4SUTP8R4 (#plotlens-outreach) is hardcoded because n8n 2.9.4 blocks $env access in node expressions (N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE default). To change the channel, update the Slack Post Summary node's channelId.value directly.

parameters.query:
UPDATE drafts
SET status='expired'
WHERE status='needs_human_review'
  AND created_at < now() - INTERVAL '14 days'
RETURNING id;

UPDATE approvals
SET decision='rejected', approval_notes=COALESCE(approval_notes,'') || ' [auto-expired]'
WHERE decision='approved' AND expires_at < now()
RETURNING id;
